name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Sky Panel

---

## Problem

What are you trying to do, and where does Sky Panel get in your way today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. Be as concrete as you can.

## Component

Which part would this touch?

- [ ] panel-api (Go control plane)
- [ ] web (panel frontend)
- [ ] site (marketing / docs site)
- [ ] daemon (sky-daemon — note: separate repo)

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about, or how you work around this now.

## Additional context

Anything else — screenshots, links, related issues.
